case_title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. ROBERT FARRELL HAIRELL ET AL

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Plaintiffs Jean Claude Lair dba Cable Car Hotel & K. Miranda, Prop. Mgr, appearing on their own behalf, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Robert Farrell Hairell.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing
2-Three Day Notice to pay rent or quit.
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

The Oral Rental Agreement is canceled. The oral lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at:
1388 California St., Unit 217, San Francisco, California 94109, San Francisco County.
Damages $900.00
Holdover damages $900.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
For a Total Judgment of $2040.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 15
Judge Pro Tem: Michell Brant, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Jean Claude Lair and K. Miranda are present in Pro Per.
Defendant Robert Farrell Hairell is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of December 5, 2016 remains on calendar. (501)
